policy.description: Malcolm 30-day index retention. Covers all growing index patterns: network-* (Zeek), arkime_sessions3-* (Suricata alerts + Arkime sessions), triage-results-* (TRI-06 execution receipts), malcolm_beats_* (Filebeat syslog + beats). v2.0.1 expanded 2026-04-11 to include malcolm_beats_* which had been silently growing uncapped (observed 28M docs/day, ~4 GB/day before coverage).
